message:
Add endorsement showcase component with multiple layouts

Features:
- Three layout modes: grid, carousel, and featured (hybrid)
- Tag-based filtering with interactive filter buttons
- Keyboard navigation (arrow keys) and touch/swipe support
- Framer Motion animations respecting prefers-reduced-motion
- Carousel navigation with prev/next buttons and dot indicators
- Responsive design for all viewport sizes

Component uses EndorsementCard and endorsement data from lib/content.ts.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
